_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative genomic analyses of neurofibromatosis tumours identify SOX9 as a biomarker and survival gene.

_contextSnippet: Strong expression of the transcription factor SOX9 is seen in neurofibroma and MPNST tissue sections, while schwannomas show weak or absent expression.
details: Strong expression of SOX9 detected in neurofibroma and MPNST tissue sections, while schwannomas show weak or absent expression
